subcodes.first_line: O confidant of the heart, It is dawn, and the fingertips, the eyes, the back, the knees and arms
subcodes.first_line_orig: دل آگاها سحرگاهست و انامل و دیده و ظهر و زانو و ساعد حتی هر تار مو چنان خسته
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions, @love of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
